languages.text: "Бег энергии, дарующий жизнь гермозатвору, иссяк, Вольный Торговец. Лишь машинный дух генератора, пробужденный ото сна, способен напитать металл Движущей Силой. Полагаю, он укрыт где-то в пределах этого отсека".

"The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."
languages.original_text: "Бег энергии, дарующий жизнь гермозатвору, иссяк, Вольный Торговец. Лишь машинный дух генератора, пробужденный ото сна, способен напитать металл Движущей Силой. Полагаю, он укрыт где-то в пределах этого отсека".

traits.locale_text: "The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

"The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

"The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

languages.text: «La corriente de energía que otorga vida al compartimento se ha secado, Comerciante. Solo el espíritu máquina del generador, despertado de su letargo, puede cargar el metal con Fuerza Motriz. Creo que se encuentra en algún lugar de este compartimento».
languages.original_text: "The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

traits.locale_text: «La corriente de energía que otorga vida al compartimento se ha secado, Comerciante. Solo el espíritu máquina del generador, despertado de su letargo, puede cargar el metal con Fuerza Motriz. Creo que se encuentra en algún lugar de este compartimento».

languages.text: “赋予气闸生命的能量之流已经枯竭，行商浪人。唯有将发电机沉睡的机魂唤醒，才能用源力为这金属充能。我相信它就在这间舱室的某个地方。”
languages.original_text: "The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

traits.locale_text: “赋予气闸生命的能量之流已经枯竭，行商浪人。唯有将发电机沉睡的机魂唤醒，才能用源力为这金属充能。我相信它就在这间舱室的某个地方。”

languages.text: "Die Energie, die der Luftschleuse Leben einhaucht, ist versiegt, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Allein der aus seinem Schlummer erweckte Maschinengeist des Generators kann das Metall mit Antriebskraft aufladen. Ich glaube, er befindet sich irgendwo in diesem Modul."
languages.original_text: "The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

traits.locale_text: "Die Energie, die der Luftschleuse Leben einhaucht, ist versiegt, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Allein der aus seinem Schlummer erweckte Maschinengeist des Generators kann das Metall mit Antriebskraft aufladen. Ich glaube, er befindet sich irgendwo in diesem Modul."

languages.text: « Le flux d'énergie qui donne vie au sas s'est tari, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Seul l'esprit de la machine du générateur, une fois tiré de sa torpeur, serait en mesure de charger le métal de Force Motrice. Sauf erreur de ma part, il doit se trouver quelque part dans ce compartiment. »
languages.original_text: "The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

traits.locale_text: « Le flux d'énergie qui donne vie au sas s'est tari, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Seul l'esprit de la machine du générateur, une fois tiré de sa torpeur, serait en mesure de charger le métal de Force Motrice. Sauf erreur de ma part, il doit se trouver quelque part dans ce compartiment. »

languages.text: "Hava kilidine hayat veren enerji akımı kurudu Hür Tacir. Ancak uykusundan uyanmış jeneratörün makine ruhu, metali Devinim Gücü ile şarj edebilir. Bu bölmenin içinde bir yerde barındığına inanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

traits.locale_text: "Hava kilidine hayat veren enerji akımı kurudu Hür Tacir. Ancak uykusundan uyanmış jeneratörün makine ruhu, metali Devinim Gücü ile şarj edebilir. Bu bölmenin içinde bir yerde barındığına inanıyorum."

languages.text: 「エアロックに命を与えるエネルギーの潮流が枯渇しました、ローグ・トレーダー。眠りから覚めたジェネレーターの機械霊だけが金属に動機力を充填できます。この区画の中にどこかにあると思います。」
languages.original_text: "The current of energy granting life to the airlock has run dry, Rogue Trader. Only the generator's machine spirit, awakened from slumber, can charge the metal with the Motive Force. I believe it is housed somewhere within this compartment."

traits.locale_text: 「エアロックに命を与えるエネルギーの潮流が枯渇しました、ローグ・トレーダー。眠りから覚めたジェネレーターの機械霊だけが金属に動機力を充填できます。この区画の中にどこかにあると思います。」
